title: Outburst Dreamer Boys: It's the Destiny of Those Born as Men
titleRomaji: Chuubyou Gekihatsu Boy: Otoko ni Umareta Shukumei Dakara
titleEnglish: Outburst Dreamer Boys: It's the Destiny of Those Born as Men
titleNative: 厨病激発ボーイ 男に生まれた宿命だから
synopsis: Unaired 12th episode that is included in the fourth home video release. The members of the Hero Club are back in action after their close call with disbandment, and they’ve been tasked with their toughest mission yet! The student council wants them to travel to a distant temple (well, lodge) and assist the guardian (well, caretaker) in his duties. As the club members set off of their quest, Mizuki begins to realize just how accustomed she’s become to her very exciting high school life… (Source: Sentai Filmworks)

title: Love Live! Sunshine!! The School Idol Movie: Over the Rainbow
titleRomaji: Love Live! Sunshine!! The School Idol Movie: Over the Rainbow
titleEnglish: Love Live! Sunshine!! The School Idol Movie: Over the Rainbow
titleNative: ラブライブ！サンシャイン!! The School Idol Movie Over the Rainbow
synopsis: In the film's story, Uranohoshi Girls' High School's idol group Aqours has won the final Love Live! contest. While preparing to enroll at a new school, the first- and second-year students encounter unexpected trouble. Also, after heading for a graduation trip, the third-year students go missing. As they are separated, the Aqours members appreciate the weight of their togetherness for the first time. In order to move forward, they must decide how to react to their new situations. (Source: Official Website)

title: Fatal Fury 2: The New Battle
titleNative: バトルファイターズ餓狼伝説2
synopsis: After defeating Geese Howard, legendary fighter Terry Bogard faces German warrior Wolfgang Krauser, only to suffer a humiliating defeat. Depressed by his loss, Terry wanders around the country, wasting his life through drinking. Only a young boy named Tony can convince Terry to go back to his winning ways, conquer his fears, and once again face Krauser. (Source: Anime News Network) Based on the Neo Geo SNK video game Fatal Fury 2.

title: Blade of the Phantom Master
titleNative: 新暗行御史
synonyms: Phantom Master: Dark Hero from the Ruined Empire
synopsis: After wandering through the desert for days, a bitter warrior named Munsu is lost and unable to continue. His life is unexpectedly saved by Mon-ryon, a young man who dreams of becoming a secret agent for Jushin, a once-great country that was recently destroyed. Mon-ryon's goal is to save his girlfriend, Chunhyan, a born fighter who is held captive by the evil Lord Byonand. Then, from out of nowhere, blood begins trickling from his chest. He has been fatally wounded by the Sarinjas, a cannibalistic breed of desert goblin. The quick-thinking Munsu convinces these beasts to spare his life, in exchange for the peaceful handover of Mon-ryon's appetizing corpse. Although skeptical of Mon-ryon's motives, Munsu sets out to continue the mission that the young idealist described. Accompanied by an army of ghost troops, unleashed using the powers of Angyo Onshi, Munsu liberates Chunhyan. After visiting her boyfriend's final resting place, she declares herself Munsu's bodyguard and, together, they

title: The Legend of Princess Chang-Ge
titleNative: 长歌行
synonyms: The Legend of Princess Chang Ge
สตรีหาญฉางเกอ
synopsis: Prince Li Jiancheng and his supporters were put to death following the Xuanwu Gate Incident, and all six of his sons—aside from one who passed away too soon—were implicated. Only the records of "the second daughter Wenxi County Lady Li Wanshun, courtesy name Wangniang, married Liu Yingdao" and "eldest daughter Li" remained in the historical record, nevertheless. The Yongning Princess Li Changge, whose parents had an unexplained and perplexing relationship with Li Shimin, emerged in these Li's mysteries. After learning of her mother's suicide and her father's murder following the Xuanwu Gate Incident, Changge fled the palace with bitterness and assumed the identity of a man in order to conceal her identity and bring troops back to Chang'an to exact revenge on her parents.

title: Monsuno: World Master
titleNative: 獣旋バトル モンスーノ
synopsis: Chase Suno and his friends, Jinja and Bren, are on a search for Chase's father, Jeredy Suno. However, they soon become involved in something else upon reaching their father's lab and becoming involved with an organism known as Monsuno. Chase, choosing to side with his father's work, denies S.T.O.R.M. access to the Monsuno and escapes. They are now on the run from the military organization, S.T.O.R.M., while still looking for Chase's father. However, a mysterious organization also has his eyes set on Chase and the group's Monsuno. (Source: Animeultima)

titleNative: ドラえもん のび太とアニマル惑星(プラネット)
synopsis: Nobita went to a world of animals through the "Wherever Gas", the substance to let you travel anywhere, same as the "Wherever Door" Doraemon uses. They came across with Chippo, a boy who looks like a dog and very adventurous. A group called Numiges plans on taking over the animal planet. Doraemon and friends plan to stop them with the animal's help. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Legendary Brave Swordsman Yaiba
titleNative: 剣勇伝説YAIBA
synopsis: Kurogane Yaiba is a boy who doesn't want to become what any regular kid would: He wants to be a samurai. That's why he undergoes a hard training with his father, knowing only the forest as his world. Then, one day, he is sent to Japan, where he has to deal with a whole new civilized reality, meeting the Mine family, the evil Onimaru and even the legendary Musashi, having lots of dangerous adventures, becoming stronger everyday. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Wakaba＊Girl
titleNative: わかば＊ガール
synopsis: The manga's story centers around the activities of Wakaba Kohashi, "a slightly out-of-tune super" daughter of a well-to-do family, and her friends. Wakaba (literally, "young leaves") looks like an elegant rich daughter, but she admires the trendy "gyaru" fashion subculture. There is also the pure, innocent, fairy-tale-like Moeko. Mao is capricious and behaves in her own way. Nao used to be an athletic type of girl, but now loves the boys-love genre. (Source: Anime News Network)

synonyms: Donten: Laughing Under The Clouds - Gaiden: Chapter 2 - The Tragedy of Fuuma Ninja Tribe
synopsis: The second part in an anime film trilogy adaptation of the Donten ni Warau Gaiden spinoff manga. The Fuuma ninja clan is a secret ninja tribe that seeks to welcome the “Orochi” when it resurrects every 300 years. In the clan we find twin brothers, Isuke and Isame, who live cursed lives after being persecuted by their tribe for being twins. This tragedy is only amplified as Isuke is faced with an impossible choice in the clan's twisted rite of passage. (Source: Eleven Arts)

title: Dragon Quest: Your Story
titleNative: ドラゴンクエスト ユア・ストーリー
synopsis: Based on Dragon Quest V: Hand of the Heavenly Bride. Ryuka was enslaved and forced into building a great temple after being stolen from his father who he watched be killed by powerful foes when he was trying to protect him as a child. When he escapes slavery 10 years later he starts a journey to uncover the secrets of his father's past and soon finds out his mother is still alive, so he sets off on an adventure to rescue her from the underworld. And, of course, he must also make the difficult decision of who to marry... Bianca or Flora? (Source: Tokyo Otaku Mode)
